name: The Cut Golf & Grill
about: The Cut Golf & Grill is a dual-purpose venue in Palmetto, Florida, offering a unique blend of dining and golf simulation experiences. It features state-of-the-art golf simulators where guests can hone their skills while enjoying fresh, locally sourced dishes. The venue combines a welcoming atmosphere with top-quality food and interactive recreation, making it suitable for both casual meals and rounds of golf with friends. Founded by two local natives with a passion for great food and golf, it serves as a community space for relaxation and connection.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art simulators for an immersive golf experience
Locally sourced food and a welcoming atmosphere for social play
Flexible booking system with walk-in availability
Option to bring personal clubs or rent on-site
Designated club cleaning station for convenience

food_and_drink.notes: Full menu with locally sourced dishes, including appetizers, salads, burgers, flatbreads, and premium sides
Beer and wine available; no outside alcohol permitted

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs, but we also offer rentals. Clubs must be free of debris, and a cleaning station is available.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: No outside food or beverages are permitted on the premises. Violators will forfeit game time and be asked to leave.

faq.question: How much time is needed for 18 holes?
faq.answer: Most groups require 2-3 hours to complete a full 18-hole round. Bays are rented by the hour.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, The Cut offers a family-friendly atmosphere with a welcoming environment suitable for all ages.
